message:
fix(web): prepend node_modules/.bin to PATH in isolated build scripts

The isolated build/lint/type-check scripts invoke `next`, `eslint`, and
`tsc` via `bash -lc`, which spawns a login shell that may not inherit
the project's node_modules/.bin from the parent environment. When the
binaries aren't on PATH the scripts fail silently or pick up a global
install with the wrong version.

Prepending `$PWD/node_modules/.bin` at the top of each inline script
ensures the locally installed toolchain is always resolved first,
regardless of the calling shell's PATH state.

Affected scripts:
- build:isolated
- start:isolated
- lint:isolated
- type-check:isolated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,13 +5,13 @@
   "scripts": {
     "dev": "next dev",
     "build": "next build",
-    "build:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next build \"$@\"' --",
+    "build:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-build-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next build \"$@\"' --",
     "start": "next start",
-    "start:isolated": "bash -lc ': \"${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:?Set ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE to the same value used for build}\"; next start \"$@\"' --",
+    "start:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; : \"${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:?Set ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE to the same value used for build}\"; next start \"$@\"' --",
     "lint": "eslint . --cache",
-    "lint:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-lint-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); eslint . --cache --cache-location \".eslintcache-${safe_scope}\" \"$@\"' --",
+    "lint:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-lint-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); eslint . --cache --cache-location \".eslintcache-${safe_scope}\" \"$@\"' --",
     "type-check": "bun run type-check:isolated",
-    "type-check:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next typegen && tsc -p \"$tsconfig\" --noEmit --incremental false'",
+    "type-check:isolated": "bash -lc 'export PATH=\"$PWD/node_modules/.bin:$PATH\"; scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-typecheck-$PPID}; safe_scope=$(printf \"%s\" \"$scope\" | tr -cs \"[:alnum:]_-\" \"-\"); tsconfig=.tsconfig.next-${safe_scope}.json; cp tsconfig.json \"$tsconfig\"; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\" ACFS_NEXT_TSCONFIG_PATH=\"$tsconfig\"; next typegen && tsc -p \"$tsconfig\" --noEmit --incremental false'",
     "verify:isolated": "bash -lc 'scope=${ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE:-verify-$PPID}; export ACFS_NEXT_DIST_SCOPE=\"$scope\"; bun run type-check:isolated && bun run lint:isolated && bun run build:isolated'",
     "test:unit": "bun test lib components",
     "test": "playwright test",
